title: I’ve built an EA that performs. Not theory, not hype — actual results.
author: shitpikji
selftext:
It’s been backtested on **5 years of Dukascopy tick data**, and the performance speaks for itself: strong consistency, controlled drawdown, and no over-optimized nonsense that falls apart in live markets.

I’m not sharing the strategy. If you’re looking for “what indicators does it use?” — this isn’t for you. I’ve put too much time into it to just give it away.

What I *am* doing is giving serious people a **free, limited trial** so you can test it yourself. Run your own backtests, forward test it, try to break it — that’s the whole point.

The EA is locked and time-restricted, so don’t expect a free copy to keep. This is for people who actually want to verify something before buying, not for collectors.

If you know what you’re doing, you’ll understand the value immediately once you see the data.

If you don’t, this probably isn’t for you anyway.

No hype, no fake promises. Just a system that works if used properly.

If you’re interested, message me and I’ll send you the trial and details.
